## Why

<!-- What user or contributor outcome improves, and what breaks without this change? -->

## Summary

<!-- Keep this to the smallest complete change. Explain decisions, not the diff. -->

## Test plan

<!-- List commands and manual evidence a reviewer can reproduce. -->

- [ ] Focused tests cover the changed behavior, or the reason tests are not needed is stated.
- [ ] The local quality gates in `AGENTS.md` pass.

## Contribution checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits, for example `fix(addon): handle removed armature`.
- [ ] Every commit carries my `Signed-off-by` trailer (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] No secrets, licensed model assets, generated build output, or unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and contributor documentation are updated where applicable.
- [ ] If this is agent-assisted, I reviewed every changed line and accept responsibility as the human author under the repository's licenses and DCO.

## Links

<!-- Link the originating issue, task, spec, or ADR. Use `Closes #123` when appropriate. -->
